title: Dynamic windows path variables do not resolve in confCons.xml
author: massibronto
body_snippet:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
Using paths in confCons.xml like:
%USERPROFILE%
%APPDATA%
is not possible.
Tag: <setting name="CustomConsPath"></setting>

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->
<!--- If you're suggesting a change/improvement, tell us how it should work -->
I would like to be able to configure this:
setting name="CustomConsPath">%APPDATA%\mRemoteNG\confCons.xml</setting

and the result...

iterations.description: The 'ConnectionFilePath' setting, when retrieved from user settings, is not expanded with environment variables, causing dynamic path variables to not resolve when loading confCons.xml.

comments.author: robertpopa22
comments.snippet:
**Fix available for testing**

A fix for this issue has been implemented in our community fork (`robertpopa22/mRemoteNG`, branch `main`). A beta build including this fix is available from the fork's Releases page.

Please test and report if this resolves your issue.

---

> *We sincerely appreciate the mRemoteNG maintainers and the wonderful community that has kept this project alive and thriving for over a decade. Your work powers thousands of IT professionals worldwide, including us. Our fork ...

notes:
AI triage (gemini): The 'ConnectionFilePath' setting, when retrieved from user settings, is not expanded with environment variables, causing dynamic path variables to not resolve when loading confCons.xml.
Approach: Expand 'Properties.OptionsConnectionsPage.Default.ConnectionFilePath' using 'Environment.ExpandEnvironmentVariables' within the 'GetStartupConnectionFileName()' method before returning the path.
